title: Tutors
description: Instruct individual students or small groups of students in academic subjects to support formal class instruction or to prepare students for standardized or admissions tests.

tasks.text: Provide feedback to students, using positive reinforcement techniques to encourage, motivate, or build confidence in students.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review class material with students by discussing text, working solutions to problems, or reviewing worksheets or other assignments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Assess students' progress throughout tutoring sessions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Teach students study skills, note-taking skills, and test-taking strategies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide private instruction to individual or small groups of students to improve academic performance, improve occupational skills, or prepare for academic or occupational tests.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Participate in training and development sessions to improve tutoring practices or learn new tutoring techniques.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collaborate with students, parents, teachers, school administrators, or counselors to determine student needs, develop tutoring plans, or assess student progress.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor student performance or assist students in academic environments, such as classrooms, laboratories, or computing centers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Schedule tutoring appointments with students or their parents.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Organize tutoring environment to promote productivity and learning.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Communicate students' progress to students, parents, or teachers in written progress reports, in person, by phone, or by email.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain records of students' assessment results, progress, feedback, or school performance, ensuring confidentiality of all records.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Identify, develop, or implement intervention strategies, tutoring plans, or individualized education plans (IEPs) for students.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare and facilitate tutoring workshops, collaborative projects, or academic support sessions for small groups of students.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare lesson plans or learning modules for tutoring sessions according to students' needs and goals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop teaching or training materials, such as handouts, study materials, or quizzes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Travel to students' homes, libraries, or schools to conduct tutoring sessions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Administer, proctor, or score academic or diagnostic assessments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Research or recommend textbooks, software, equipment, or other learning materials to complement tutoring.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
